title: Everbuild Roll & Stroll Premium Carpet Protector – Self-Adhesive – Easy To Roll – Totally Waterproof – Yellow – 600mm x 25m
features: TOTALLY WATERPROOF – Designed to protect your carpets from spillages of paint, varnish, oil and more when conducting DIY work.
EASY TO APPLY AND REMOVE – No need for an applicator, just roll it out and smooth it down by hand.
SAFER THAN DUST SHEETS - Better adhesion firmly holding the protection film onto the carpet reducing trip hazards.

FOUR WEEKS' PROTECTION – Low-traffic areas can enjoy long-lasting protection for up to a month, and it leaves behind no sticky glue residue when removed. In high-traffic areas, replace at one week in high traffic areas or where air temperature exceeds 22°C.

THICKER – This premium carpet protector is more than 50% thicker than Roll and Stroll Contract Grade Carpet Protector providing added reassurance against ripping or tearing when foot traffic or ladders are placed onto the film.
MULTIPLE SIZES AVAILABLE – This hardwearing film comes in 25m and 75m lengths for larger areas.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Ensure surfaces are clean sound, dust free and dry before application. Remove outer packaging from roll. Place roll on the floor facing the direction it is to be applied and unwind. Ensure the roll is stuck by smoothing out by either hand or foot. Simply push roll forward using hands or feet ensuring roll goes in a straight line. Carefully cut with a sharp knife or scissors, take care not to damage or scratch the covered surface.
